name: Antigravity
desc:
You have Flying Movement. When you use a Gravity element ability gain +1 [img:spd].
Gravity element spells cost -1 mana.

name: Antigravity2
desc:
You have Flying Movement. When you use a Gravity element ability gain +2 [img:spd].
Gravity element spells cost -2 mana.

name: Soul Shatter
desc: When you kill a unit, deal 1 damage to all enemies.

name: SoulShatter2
desc: When you kill a unit, deal 2 damage to all enemies.

name: Glow
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Blind.

name: Glow2
desc: All damage you deal inflicts Blind.

name: Blink
desc: 33% chance to teleport to a random tile when targeted by an enemy.

name: Blink2
desc: 50% chance to teleport to a random tile when targeted by an enemy.

name: Full Power
desc: While at full mana, your basic attack deals triple damage and has +3 Knockback.

name: FullPower2
desc:
While at full mana, your basic attack deals triple damage and has +3 Knockback.
Bonus Ability: Grow Head.

name: Reality Shatter
desc: Gravity element abilities spawn Floating Glass.

name: RealityShatter2
desc: Gravity element abilities spawn Floating Glass and inflict Bleed 1.

name: Mental Storm
desc: Gain +1 Charge when you cast a spell.

name: MentalStorm2
desc: Gain +2 Charge when you cast a spell.

name: Wither
desc: Gravity element abilities inflict a random negative status effect when used on enemies.

name: Wither2
desc: Gravity element abilities inflict a random negative status effect when used on enemies. When you inflict a negative status effect, inflict +1 of that status effect.

name: Flourish
desc: Gravity element abilities do not harm allies. Gravity element abilities give a random positive status effect when used on allies. When you inflict a positive status effect, inflict +1 of that status effect.

name: Flourish2
desc: Gravity element abilities do not harm allies. Gravity element abilities give a random positive status effect when used on allies. When you inflict a positive status effect, inflict +2 of that status effect.

name: Psy Smack
desc: Knockback damage you and your allies deal is doubled.

name: PsySmack2
desc: Knockback damage and distance you and your allies deal is doubled and has Chain Knockback.

name: Beckon
desc: Your basic attack has +4 Knockback.

name: Beckon2
desc: Your basic attack has +4 Knockback and Chain Knockback.

name: Mind Tempest
desc: After every sixth spell you cast, gain All Stats Up and +1 Magic Damage.

name: MindTempest2
desc: After every sixth spell you cast, gain All Stats Up, +1 Magic Damage, and reduce the cost of your spells by 1 mana.

name: Overflow
desc: While at full mana, gain +2 Brace and Flying Movement. Your mana is uncapped.

name: Overflow2
desc: While at full mana, gain +2 Brace and Teleportation. Your mana is uncapped.

name: Omniscience
desc: You can see EVERYTHING. Line of sight restrictions are ignored.

name: Omniscience2
desc: You can see EVERYTHING. Line of sight restrictions are ignored.

name: Psionic Repel
desc: Units that attack or contact you get knocked back 10 tiles.

name: PsionicRepel2
desc: Units that attack or contact you get knocked back 10 tiles and are Immobilized.

name: Enlightened
desc: While at full mana, the first spell you cast each turn is free.

name: Enlightened2
desc: While at full mana, all of your spells are free to cast once a turn.

name: Mad Visage
desc:
All injuries you get are Disfigured.
While at full mana, your basic action inflicts Madness.
While you have 0 or less [img:cha] you can attack an additional time each turn.

name: MadVisage2
desc:
All injuries you get are Disfigured.
Units that contact or attack you get Madness.
While at full mana, your basic attack inflicts Madness.
While at 0 [img:cha] you can attack 2 additional times each turn.

name: Power Up
desc: When you gain excess mana, gain +1 Magic Damage and +1 [img:int].

name: PowerUp2
desc: When you gain excess mana, gain +1 Magic Damage, +1 [img:int]. and +1 [img:divineshield].

name: True Sight
desc: You and your allies can't miss enemies within your line of sight.

name: TrueSight2
desc: You and your allies can't miss enemies within your line of sight. Allied physical attacks gain +50% critical hit chance against those enemies.

name: Braingeyser
desc: When you gain excess mana, emit that many Sparkles.

name: Braingeyser2
desc: When you gain excess mana, emit that many Sparkles and remove all your debuffs.

name: Gravity Well
desc: When a unit is knocked through a tile adjacent to you, stop it and inflict Stun.

name: GravityWell2
desc: When a unit is knocked through a tile adjacent to you, stop it, inflict Stun and deal 5 damage to it.

name: Drag
desc: Units that you knockback take 1 damage for each tile they pass through.

name: Drag2
desc: Units that you knockback take 2 damage for each tile they pass through.

name: Twiddle
desc: Your basic attack deals 0 damage, but you can use it 2 additional times each turn.

name: Twiddle2
desc: Start each battle with +5 Bonus Attacks. Your basic attack deals 0 damage, but you can use it 2 additional times each turn.

name: Repressed Memories
desc: When you spend mana, cast a random Psychic spell that costs less than the mana spent.

name: RepressedMemories2
desc: When you spend mana, cast a random spell from any class that costs less than the mana spent.

name: Eldritch Visage
desc: At the start of your turn, inflict Magic Weakness 1 on all enemies in your line of sight.

name: EldritchVisage2
desc: At the start of your turn, inflict Magic Weakness 1 and Marked on all enemies in your line of sight.
